NOT REPORTED-HELD ON OCT-14-2004 IN 306, RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL - IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT GAIL PIPER AND AGAINST DEFENDANT/APPELLANT ROBB FLEISCHER IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000.00 PLUS $52.00 COSTS. JUDGE KEVIN M. MCCARTHY; CLERK MARILYN L. FLORES
